MEDIA

Here you will find images and sounds, at least for now.

Images

SOUNDS

Most of theses sounds are from the Dragon Ball Z video games Super Butoden 2 and 3. The files are in MP3 (mpeg layer 3) format, so you need an mp3 player like Winamp or Nad. You can get one at Mp3.com.

Rock the Dragon-The english U.S. version of the intro to Dragon Ball Z, file size=442kb
Chala-Head-Chala-The original Japanese intro to Dragon Ball Z, file size=384kb
Super Kamehameha-Goku unleashes his Saiyan rage in his famous Kamehameha, file size=113kb
KAKAROTTO-Brolli calls to Goku, his enemy since birth, file size=31kb
Ometa de Bueta! Ha!-Um, Goku says something... file size=30kb
Bojack-Bojack, the jolly green giant pirate, laughs at his defeated enemy, file size=22kb
Big Bang Attack!-Vegeta blows his opponenets away, file size=20kb
Kamehameha!!-Gohan follow in his father's footsteps and does the Kamehameha attack, file size=18kb
Masenko!!-Gohan does his famous attack, file size=16kb
Final Flash!!-Vegeta just being mean now... file size=15kb
Chala-Head-Chala-The original Japanese intro to Dragon Ball Z, but in MIDI format, file size=69kb
Princess Yoyo and the Sacred Dragons -The background music to my page,as requested, its form the game "Bahamut Lagoon," MIDI format, file size=15kb
